answers: Speed reading techniques: reduce subvocalization, use a pointer (finger/pen), expand peripheral vision, and chunk words.
Tips: preview text first (headings, bold), don't re-read, practice with easier material, and increase speed gradually.
Average reading: 200-250 wpm. Speed readers: 400-700 wpm. Elite: 1000+ wpm. Comprehension matters more than speed.
Taratari pora: subvocalization komao (mon e na poro), finger diye guide koro, ar practice koro daily.
